summary: A single static shot of Angel Mom Patty Morin speaking emotionally at the White House podium about her murdered daughter, with a red headline title card and burned-in captions. Aside from the title banner it is an unedited podium remarks clip with no music, fast-cutting, or genre styling. Emotional but not a produced youth-appeal spectacle.
notable_text: “These are the Kind of Criminals We Need to Remove From Our Country”: Angel Mom at WH
